rules.when: website or company evidence shows CNC machining
website shows Request a Quote, Quote, or RFQ language
website shows prototyping, contract manufacturing, build to print, or rapid turnaround
website shows aerospace or defence work
website shows F1 or motorsport work
website shows a capabilities or equipment page
website shows DMG Mori, Mazak, Matsuura, Okuma, Hermle, or Haas
website shows medical manufacturing or ISO 13485
website shows tight tolerances, high precision, or complex parts
website looks like a repair shop, directory listing, or non-industrial false positive
website emphasizes sheet metal, fabrication, welding, bending, or stamping
website emphasizes high volume or serial production
